'''鈭歾-j-r-ch''' ('''kazajrechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unapprove|unapprove]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-j-r-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unapprove|unapprove]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾-j-r-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kazajrechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizajrechoko|thizajrechoko]] || [[word:jizajrechoko|jizajrechoko]] || [[word:shizajrechoko|shizajrechoko]] || [[word:kizajrechoko|kizajrechoko]]
